title: Finding v1 — normalised security/compliance finding
description: Clean-room contract for a normalised finding imported from a security tool (SAST/DAST/SCA/SBOM/secrets). Vendor-neutral shape an implementer codes against; carries an evidence class per claim<=proof.

id.description: Stable finding id (tool id or hash of location+rule).

sha256.description: Hash of the affected artefact, if applicable.

evidence_class.description: DOWOD = reproducible with the given location/hash; GAP = suspected/unconfirmed; NARRACJA = advisory framing.

vex_status.description: VEX-aligned exploitability status (CRA/AI Act art.72 friendly).
